title: The Most Dangerous Job in the World!

scenes.text: Logging is statistically the most dangerous job in the world!
Loggers face fatal injury rates much higher than other professions.
Hazards include falling trees, heavy equipment accidents, and rough terrains.
Push for safety regulations continues to save lives!
scenes.label: SAFETY FIRST!

scenes.text: Follow so you never run out of fun facts.

description: Logging is one of the most dangerous professions worldwide, but safety efforts are making a difference! Follow for daily facts!
